name: Cypress Motors-Ridgewood Inc
description_short: Used car dealership in Ridgewood, NY offering in-house auto financing for customers with poor, no, or challenged credit since 1997.
description_long:
Cypress Motors of Ridgewood has operated as a used car dealership in Queens, New York for over 30 years, established in 1997. The company initially focused on serving credit-challenged customers who were denied financing elsewhere, and has since expanded into a full-service dealership offering financing options across the credit spectrum—from excellent to subprime.

The dealership specializes in subprime and bad credit auto financing, offering in-house financing programs for customers with bankruptcy, repossessions, no credit history, divorce, new driver status, and income from SSI/SSD/cash sources. They stock a diverse inventory of used vehicles—sedans, trucks, vans, and SUVs—from brands including Honda, Toyota, Ford, Chevrolet, Hyundai, Nissan, and others, priced from under $5,000 to $20,000+. Customers can apply online, view inventory, and arrange financing for approved purchases.

Cypress Motors distinguishes itself through several practical features: they accept alternative income documentation (SSI, SSD, cash income), offer payments reported to all three credit bureaus to help customers rebuild credit, require a $4,000 minimum down payment for non-traditional income situations, and market guaranteed credit approval with rapid approval times. They operate a single physical location and provide bilingual service (Se Habla Español).

However, prospective buyers should note this is fundamentally a used car dealership offering dealer financing, not a personal loan lender. Interest rates and loan terms are not disclosed on the website. The subprime auto financing model typically carries significantly higher APRs than traditional lenders. The minimum down payment requirement and focus on rebuilding credit suggest this serves customers with limited financial options.
pros: In-house financing for customers with bankruptcy, repossessions, and poor credit history
Accepts alternative income documentation (SSI, SSD, cash income) that traditional lenders reject
Payment reporting to all three credit bureaus supports credit rebuilding
Rapid approval process (minutes claimed) with online application option
Large inventory of diverse used vehicles from economy to premium brands
Established 30-year track record serving same community since 1997
Bilingual customer service (Se Habla Español) and trade-in value assessment
cons: Subprime financing model typically carries significantly higher interest rates than traditional auto lenders
Interest rates, APR, and loan terms not disclosed on website
Requires $4,000 minimum down payment for non-traditional income, limiting accessibility for extremely low-income buyers
Single location in Ridgewood limits convenience for broader service area
Used vehicle inventory with high mileage (ranging 60K-185K miles) may require repairs
best_for: Buyers with poor credit history or bankruptcy who cannot qualify for traditional auto financing
Self-employed individuals and those with SSI/SSD income requiring alternative income documentation
Customers seeking to rebuild credit through payment reporting while obtaining vehicle financing
Budget-conscious used car buyers prioritizing approval speed over loan rate optimization
diagnosis: Cypress Motors is a used car dealership offering dealer-financed auto loans for credit-challenged customers, not a personal loan provider. It is best suited for buyers who cannot qualify for traditional auto financing and specifically need to purchase a vehicle while rebuilding credit. The critical caveat: subprime auto financing typically carries APRs of 15-29%+ and requires substantial down payments, making total vehicle costs significantly higher than conventional financing.
services: Subprime auto financing for bad credit and no credit customers
In-house dealer financing with guaranteed credit approval
Used vehicle sales (sedans, trucks, vans, SUVs)
Financing for alternative income (SSI, SSD, cash income)
Inventory search by make, model, and price range
